Back to Home

The Plan

ROADMAP

One URL. Every vulnerability. No jargon.

Phase 01 — Now

Launch

  • Repo URL input
  • Security + technical debt scan
  • AI-generated plain-English report
  • Repo Health Score
  • Basic frontend UI

Phase 02 — Next

Integrate

  • GitHub integration — auto scan on push
  • Improved detection accuracy
  • Scan history tracking
  • Team dashboards

Phase 03 — Soon

Automate

  • AI fix suggestions — code-level guidance
  • Pull request generation
  • File-level explanations
  • Smarter prioritization

Phase 04 — Future

Scale

  • Multi-repo monitoring
  • Organization-wide insights
  • CI/CD integration
  • Enterprise-ready features

TECH STACK

What Powers GitHopper

Frontend

React.js Tailwind CSS

Backend

AWS Lambda API Gateway

AI Layer

Amazon Bedrock Claude

Data & Hosting

Amazon S3 AWS Amplify

Integrations

GitHub REST API

Monitoring

AWS CloudWatch AWS IAM
